doc: Application root model. Intended runtime composition root; current target may bootstrap TreeEditor directly until AppNode is materialized.

children.doc: Root node of the executable tree editor branch. Mounts the editor into a host container, owns the toolbar, mode holder, and pane, and provides isEditMode derived from EditorModeHolder state.
Horizontal toolbar area. Immutable container for EditToggleBtn.

Switchable holder for the mode toggle action. Owns the active visual sub-state, switches between EditToggleBtnViewModeState and EditToggleBtnEditModeState based on editor mode, and reads isEditMode from ancestor TreeEditor on refresh().
Default visual state of EditToggleBtn. Owns the 'Edit mode' action content. Its content owns the low-level activation subscription and forwards a semantic toggle request to TreeEditor.
Edit visual state of EditToggleBtn. Owns the 'View mode' action content. Its content owns the low-level activation subscription and forwards a semantic toggle request to TreeEditor.
Displays the build timestamp. Informational leaf node, no interaction.
Switchable state holder owning the editor mode state. Children: _viewModeState (default), _editModeState.
State node for view mode. onOpen(): applies view-mode presentation to TreeEditor and calls refreshAll().
State node for edit mode. onOpen(): applies edit-mode presentation to TreeEditor and calls refreshAll().
Main content area of the editor. Immutable container holding RootItemHolder.
Mutable container holding the single root TreeItem instance. Initialises the tree from source data.
Runtime root item created by RootItemHolder from source data.
Project library branch. Contains reusable node templates referenced from executable branches.
Library namespace for editor pane nodes. Detailed branch is stored in top/libraries/pane.library.json.
Project asset catalog. Describes project-local source assets stored under top/assets.
Demo source tree data used by the application entry point.
Presentation branch. Owns platform-neutral theme/style source model; target may compile it into presentation artifacts or materialize it as runtime nodes when needed.
Switchable holder for active presentation theme. Owns theme state and exposes the active theme model.
Light theme state derived from presentation source artifacts.
Dark theme state derived from presentation source artifacts.
Presentation provider for TreeEditor nodes. Interprets source presentation rules and exposes platform-neutral style roles plus target-specific materialization helpers.
